seeds.value: Define your brand standards here. Example: Voice: professional yet approachable. Colors: #1E40AF primary, #F59E0B accent. Tone: confident, clear, never condescending. Terminology: 'workspace' not 'project', 'pipeline' not 'flow'.
seeds.description: Core brand standards -- used as the baseline for all content scoring

seeds.value: Flag individual content with overall score below 70. Escalate to executive-assistant when 3+ content items in a week score below 75 or when average scores drop 10+ points over a month.
seeds.description: Thresholds for brand drift alerts and escalation
